refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imbwmorph3(volume, operation); out = imbwmorph3(volume, operation, iterations, connectivity)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Supports 3D erode, dilate, open, and close operations with 6- or 26-connectivity. The output is a boolean volume.

refsection.title: Examples
